text: Hello. Thanks, please stay on the line. Hello, good afternoon. This is Evelyn. So, have you been notified about these benefits yet? No. Oh, that's all right. That's exactly why I'm calling. I want to help you get these benefits processed before they go unclaimed. You're covered under both Part A and Part B, yes? Can you hear me? I was just asking if you have Medicare Part A and Part B.
